title: Shri Shailputri Mata Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Shailputri Mata Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Shailputri.
description:
Shailputri Maa bail par savar,
Karen devta jai jaikar॥
Shiv Shankar ki priya Bhavani.
Teri mahima kisi ne na jaani॥
॥ Jai Maa Shailputri ki ॥

Parvati tu Uma kehlave.
Jo tujhe simre so sukh paave॥
Riddhi-Siddhi parvaan kare tu.
Daya kare dhanwan kare tu॥
॥ Jai Maa Shailputri ki ॥

Somvar ko Shiv sang pyari.
Aarti teri jisne utari॥
Uski sagri aas puja do.
Sagare dukh takleef mila do॥
॥ Jai Maa Shailputri ki ॥

Ghee ka sundar deep jala ke.
Gola gari ka bhog laga ke॥
Shraddha bhav se mantra gaayein.
Prem sahit phir sheesh jhukayein॥
॥ Jai Maa Shailputri ki ॥

Jai Giriraj Kishori Ambe.
Shiv mukh Chandra chakori Ambe॥
Manokamna purn kar do.
Bhakt sada sukh sampatti bhar do॥
॥ Jai Maa Shailputri ki ॥

faq.q1: What is the significance of Maa Shailputri's Aarti?
faq.a1: Maa Shailputri is the first form of Goddess Durga; her Aarti brings stability to life, promotes good health, and helps awaken the Muladhara Chakra.
faq.q2: Which is the most auspicious day for worshipping Maa Shailputri?
faq.a2: The first day of Navratri (Pratipada) is dedicated to Maa Shailputri and is considered the most auspicious day for her worship.
faq.q3: What offerings (Prasad) are preferred for Mother Shailputri during Aarti?
faq.a3: Pure Desi Ghee is considered very dear to Maa Shailputri; offering it is believed to be highly auspicious.
faq.q4: Can Maa Shailputri's Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: Yes, it is very auspicious to perform her Aarti in the home temple before her idol or picture on the first day of Navratri.
faq.q5: Which mantra should be chanted after the Aarti for peace of mind?
faq.a5: Chanting the mantra 'Om Shailaputryai Namah' after the Aarti is the best way to focus and calm the mind.
